data-ylk="slk:Mexico;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Mexico","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">Mexico</a>.</p><p>During <a rel="" class="link had qualified were placed into their respective groups. Six groups were slotted with the winners of the playoff finals.</p><div class="sda-placeholder-txt">Advertisement</div><div class="bodyad-wrapper hidden" id="sda-body"><div class="sda-text">Advertisement</div><div class="body-ads" id="sda-bodysda"><div class="responsive-sda" id="_R_o3gudcaanpfiv65bH1_"><div class="hidden" id="_R_o3gudcaanpfiv65b_"></div><div class="sda-text" style="height:250px;width:300px">Advertisement</div><style type="text/css">#_R_o3gudcaanpfiv65bH1_ { display: none; }

        #_R_o3gudcaanpfiv65bH1_ { display: flex; }
        iframe { max-width: 100vw; }
      }</style></div></div></div><p>The United States, having automatically qualified as one of the tournament hosts, was already slotted into Group D. It will <a rel="" class="link  yahoo-link" href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/article/2026-world-cup-draw-usmnt-catches-a-break-with-favorable-group-including-australia-and-paraguay-191355105.html" data-i13n="slk:begin its tournament June 12;cpos:3;pos:1" data-ylk="slk:begin its tournament June 12;slk:begin its tournament June 12;cpos:3;pos:1;elm:context_link;itc:0;sec:content-canvas;outcm:mb_qualified_link;_E:mb_qualified_link;ct:story;" data-yga="{"yLinkPosition":"3","yLinkElement":"context_link","yPosition":"1","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"begin its tournament June 12","yHasCommerce":false}">begin its tournament June 12</a> at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California against <a class="link " href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/paraguay-women/" data-i13n="sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link" data-ylk="slk:Paraguay;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Paraguay","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">Paraguay</a>. The Americans will then play <a class="link " href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/australia/" data-i13n="sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link" data-ylk="slk:Australia;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Australia","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">Australia</a> before finishing the group stage against Türkiye, which beat Kosovo on Tuesday to qualify.</p><p><a rel="" class="link " href="https://fantasysports.yahoo.com/pickem/2026-soccer-pickem/picks" data-i13n="slk:Play 2026 Soccer Pick 'Em with FOX One and make your picks for the world's biggest soccer tournament];cpos:4;pos:1" data-ylk="slk:Play 2026 Soccer Pick 'Em with FOX One and make your picks for the world's biggest soccer tournament;slk:Play 2026 Soccer Pick 'Em with FOX One and make your picks for the world's biggest soccer tournament];cpos:4;pos:1;elm:context_link;itc:0;sec:content-canvas" data-yga="{"yLinkPosition":"4","yLinkElement":"context_link","yPosition":"1","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Play 2026 Soccer Pick '","yHasCommerce":false}"><strong>Play 2026 Soccer Pick 'Em with FOX One and make your picks for the world's biggest soccer tournament</strong></a></p><p>Canada is in Group B and will open against Bosnia and Herzegovina on June 12 at BMO Field in Toronto. Its final two group stage games will be against <a class="link " href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/qatar/" data-i13n="sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link" data-ylk="slk:Qatar;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Qatar","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">Qatar</a> and <a class="link " href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/switzerland/" data-i13n="sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link" data-ylk="slk:Switzerland;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"Switzerland","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">Switzerland</a>.</p><p>Mexico gets the honor of hosting the opening match of the World Cup on June 11 against <a class="link " href="https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/teams/south-africa/" data-i13n="sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link" data-ylk="slk:South Africa;sec:content-canvas;subsec:anchor_text;elm:context_link;itc:0" data-yga="{"yLinkElement":"context_link","yModuleName":"content-canvas","yLinkText":"South Africa","ySubModuleName":"anchor_text","yHasCommerce":false}">South Africa</a> at Estadio Azteca in Mexico City. data-jump-link-target="" id="world-cup-2026-format">World Cup 2026 format</h2><p>The 48 teams were drawn in 12 four-team groups. Each team will play three games within its group to determine the countries that will advance to the knockout round stage.</p><div class="sda-placeholder-txt">Advertisement</div><div class="bodyad-wrapper hidden" id="sda-body"><div class="sda-text">Advertisement</div><div class="body-ads" id="sda-bodysda"><div class="responsive-sda" id="_R_odgudcaanpfiv65bH1_"><div class="hidden" id="_R_odgudcaanpfiv65b_"></div><div class="sda-text" style="height:250px;width:300px">Advertisement</div><style type="text/css">#_R_odgudcaanpfiv65bH1_ { display: none; }
@media screen and (max-width: 767.95px) {
        #_R_odgudcaanpfiv65bH1_ { display: flex; }
        iframe { max-width: 100vw; }
      }</style></div></div></div><p>There will be 32 teams advancing to the knockout round following the group stage. The top two teams from each group will move on along with the eight best third-place teams. Tiebreakers will consist of (in order) goal differential, goals scored, head-to-head play, fair play record and then drawing of lots.</p><p>For this World Cup, FIFA has made tweaks. In the pursuit of competitive balance, two pathways have been created to the semifinals that will prevent the two highest-ranking teams from meeting before the final should they win their respective groups. As an example, Spain is the highest-ranked team in the tournament, with defending champion Argentina ranked second. Those two nations were drawn into opposite pathways. It is the same for France (No. 3) and England (No. 4), so the top four teams, should they win their groups, will not meet until the semifinals.</p><p>As with all World Cups, teams from the same confederation (example: Brazil and Uruguay) were unable to be drawn into the same group, except for those from Europe.</p><p><strong><em>Want to experience the action first-hand? The co-hosts will also face Korea and Czechia in Group A.\",\"length\":191,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"locationNumber\":2,\"subtype\":\"in-body\",\"type\":\"ad\"},{\"type\":\"heading\",\"content\":\"Qualified teams for the 2026 World Cup\",\"length\":38,\"tagName\":\"h2\",\"attribs\":{\"id\":\"qualified-teams-for-the-2026-world-cup\",\"data-jump-link-target\":\"\"}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"$81\",\"length\":513,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"type\":\"heading\",\"content\":\"World Cup 2026 format\",\"length\":21,\"tagName\":\"h2\",\"attribs\":{\"id\":\"world-cup-2026-format\",\"data-jump-link-target\":\"\"}},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"The 48 teams were drawn in 12 four-team groups. Each team will play three games within its group to determine the countries that will advance to the knockout round stage.\",\"length\":170,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"locationNumber\":3,\"subtype\":\"in-body\",\"type\":\"ad\"},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"There will be 32 teams advancing to the knockout round following the group stage. The top two teams from each group will move on along with the eight best third-place teams. Tiebreakers will consist of (in order) goal differential, goals scored, head-to-head play, fair play record and then drawing of lots.\",\"length\":307,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"For this World Cup, FIFA has made tweaks. In the pursuit of competitive balance, two pathways have been created to the semifinals that will prevent the two highest-ranking teams from meeting before the final should they win their respective groups. As an example, Spain is the highest-ranked team in the tournament, with defending champion Argentina ranked second. Those two nations were drawn into opposite pathways. It is the same for France (No. 3) and England (No. 4), so the top four teams, should they win their groups, will not meet until the semifinals.\",\"length\":561,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"As with all World Cups, teams from the same confederation (example: Brazil and Uruguay) were unable to be drawn into the same group, except for those from Europe.\",\"length\":162,\"tagName\":\"p\"},{\"type\":\"text\",\"content\":\"\u003cstrong\u003e\u003cem\u003eWant to experience the action first-hand?
